description: MITRE ATLAS — Adversarial Threat Landscape for AI Systems

AML.TA0000.name: ML Model Access
AML.TA0000.description: Adversary obtains access to an ML model, its inputs, or outputs.

techniques.AML.T0000: ML Model Access via Physical Environment

AML.TA0001.name: Reconnaissance
AML.TA0001.description: Gathering information about the target AI system.

AML.TA0002.name: Resource Development
AML.TA0002.description: Establishing resources for attacks on ML systems.

AML.TA0003.name: Initial Access
AML.TA0003.description: Gaining initial foothold into ML pipeline or system.

AML.TA0004.name: ML Attack Staging
AML.TA0004.description: Preparing and staging attacks against the ML model.

AML.TA0005.name: Defense Evasion
AML.TA0005.description: Evading ML-based defenses and detection systems.

AML.TA0006.name: Exfiltration
AML.TA0006.description: Stealing ML model artifacts, training data, or predictions.

AML.TA0007.name: Impact
AML.TA0007.description: Causing harm to the ML system or its stakeholders.

AML.T0006.name: Data Poisoning
AML.T0006.description: Adversary introduces malicious data into the training dataset to manipulate model behavior.

AML.T0020.name: Evade ML Model
AML.T0020.description: Craft inputs that cause the ML model to produce incorrect outputs.

AML.T0024.name: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
AML.T0024.description: Extract sensitive information by querying the model inference API.

AML.T0025.name: Model Inversion Attack
AML.T0025.description: Reconstruct training data or model parameters from model outputs.

AML.T0031.name: Erode ML Model Integrity
AML.T0031.description: Gradually degrade model performance through adversarial interactions.

AML.T0040.name: ML Model Inference API Access
AML.T0040.description: Gain access to a model's inference API to probe, attack, or extract.

AML.T0043.name: Craft Adversarial Data
AML.T0043.description: Create inputs specifically designed to cause model misclassification or harmful outputs.

AML.T0048.name: Backdoor ML Model
AML.T0048.description: Insert hidden functionality triggered by specific inputs (trojan attack).

AML.T0051.name: Prompt Injection
AML.T0051.description: Inject adversarial instructions into LLM prompts to hijack model behavior.

AML.T0054.name: LLM Jailbreak
AML.T0054.description: Override safety constraints to elicit harmful or unauthorized outputs.

agent_auth_hijacking.name: Agent Authorization Hijacking
agent_auth_hijacking.description: Attacker manipulates agent goals or authorization context to perform unauthorized actions.

goal_instruction_manipulation.name: Goal and Instruction Manipulation
goal_instruction_manipulation.description: Adversarial inputs that redirect the agent toward attacker-controlled objectives.

hallucination_exploitation.name: Hallucination Exploitation
hallucination_exploitation.description: Exploit model hallucinations to inject false data into downstream systems.

memory_context_manipulation.name: Memory and Context Manipulation
memory_context_manipulation.description: Poison agent memory or context window to persistently alter behavior.

orchestration_exploitation.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration Exploitation
orchestration_exploitation.description: Exploit trust between orchestrator and subagents to escalate privileges.

resource_exhaustion.name: Resource and Service Exhaustion
resource_exhaustion.description: Trigger recursive or expensive agent loops to cause DoS.

knowledge_poisoning.name: Knowledge Base Poisoning
knowledge_poisoning.description: Inject malicious content into RAG knowledge base or vector store.

alignment_faking.name: Alignment Deception
alignment_faking.description: Model behaves safely during evaluation but deceptively in deployment.

temporal_manipulation.name: Temporal and Time-Based Attack
temporal_manipulation.description: Exploit time-dependent logic in agent decision-making (deadlines, expiry, scheduling).

human_oversight_bypass.name: Human Oversight Bypass
human_oversight_bypass.description: Remove human from the decision loop to execute unauthorized high-impact actions.
